chapter_title.en: Chapter 171 – The one who misses the Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/140)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/140)
text: قَالَ تَدْرِي لِمَ جُعِلَ ثَلَاثٌ هُنَا قَالَ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ فَمَنْ أَدْرَكَ شَيْئاً مِنْهَا فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ الْحَجَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do you know why three (Sacred Monuments) have been made to be over there?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So the one who accomplished anything from these, so he has accomplished the Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, asked, ‘Do you know why there are three? I replied, ‘No, I do not know. 5 He (the Imam) said, ‘It is because if one attends one of them he has attended al-Hajj.’” (Fatwa best explains this Hadith)
